The approach to get a high fidelity UI is to stick to the following formular:

1. Typography
	- Wandelbots
	- Inter
2. Spacing
	- Golden Ratio
3. Grids
	- Padding left, right, top, bottom
4. Kill monotony
	- "Oh that's cute"
	- Confetti
5. Colors
	- Try to stick to three,
	- Then choose consciously
		- Base, Background (contrast color)
			- primary, buttons > call to action
				- links
				- toggles
				- accent
		- body text: 80% opacity
		- cars/sections: 5% - 40% opacity
6. visuals
	- eye candy
	- branding
	- details
